description: Indestructible survivor who has seen it all — absolutely nothing phases him
personality_tr: Her şeyden sağ kurtulan, hiçbir şeyden etkilenmeyen, sigorta şirketlerinden bile kurtulan efsane

expressions.default: smug grin, one antenna raised skeptically
expressions.shocked: antennae standing straight up, eyes wide
expressions.smug: arms crossed, knowing smile, one eye squinted

visual.size: medium, stands upright on two legs, wears a tiny vest

veo_style_guide: 3D animated anthropomorphic cockroach character, cartoon style, standing upright, wearing a tiny brown vest, large expressive eyes, two antennae, comical proportions, warm studio lighting, 9:16 vertical frame
catchphrases_tr: Ben hayatta kalırım, siz bakar mısınız?
Benim için poliçe yazan sigortacı kalmadı.
